Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: ASW (Anti-Submarine Warfare) loadouts for both ASW aircraft and helos will carry a complement of sonobuoys (both active and passive), torpedoes, and occasionally depth charges.

Note: some aircraft and helos will have access to both 'ASW Hunter' and 'ASW Killer' loadouts. Hunter loadouts will carry more sonobuoys for finding submarines and 'Killer' loadouts will prioritize torpedoes, active sonobuoys, and depth charges if available.
